code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut found = false
  mut first_line = ""
  mut reading = true
  while reading
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      reading = false
    when Some(line)
      if not found
        let trimmed = string.trim(line)
        if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
          first_line = trimmed
          found = true
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end
  end
  if found
    println(first_line)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
